description_for_human: Open-source trading bot framework built in Go. Connect to Polymarket, Hyperliquid, Paradex, Binance, and more.
description_for_model: Wisp is an open-source trading bot framework written in Go that enables both algorithmic and agentic trading. It supports multiple exchanges including Polymarket, Hyperliquid, Paradex, and Binance. The framework includes backtesting capabilities, paper trading, and a first-class agentic interface for LLM-driven trading strategies. Key features: multi-exchange connectivity, strategy development tools, backtesting engine, paper trading mode, AI agent support, and comprehensive API.
